_comment: Shape of one agent definition. export-agents.ps1 writes a real <agent-name>.json per live agent here (overwriting this is not needed -- it is ignored by deploy-agents.ps1). deploy-agents.ps1 reads the others back to (re)create the agents. You can also hand-author definitions in this shape.
name: fabopsorchestrator
description: FabOps Orchestrator - the front door; routes explain / author / run and stays in front of the user.
instructions: <the agent's full system prompt goes here>

tools._note: AG-UI render tools the agent calls to draw UI (the bridge turns these function-calls into AG-UI tool events that CopilotKit renders). Each is a normal function tool with its own JSON-schema parameters.
MCP tool - e.g. the Cosmos governance store (FabOps.CosmosMcp). The key is part of the URL; keep it out of source.
A2A link - the orchestrator calls a specialist. Create specialists first so their ids exist.

connected_agent.name: rules_generator_manager
connected_agent.description: Author/manage FRL rules and persist run results.
